text:
Hello Janos,
 
 patch looks good.  Just needs to be resolved with the other
 two PRs mentioned i.e. is xerces .28 going to be called xerces-c2
 or xerces-c2-devel?
 
 I am not working in this area any more so the port is up for
 adoption. Janos?
 
 thanks
